name: Fixable Severity at least Important in Application Layers
description: Alert on deployments with fixable vulnerabilities with a Severity Rating at least Important, evaluating only application image layers (excluding base image layers).
rationale: Base image vulnerabilities are typically managed by the base image maintainer. Application layer vulnerabilities are under the developer's control and should be prioritized for remediation.
remediation: Use your package manager to update to a fixed version in future builds. Base image vulnerabilities are excluded from this policy — address those by updating the base image separately.
